title: Finish remaining foundation localization cleanup
summary: Replace the remaining user-facing hardcoded typography badge formatting in the native foundation workspace with a typed localized formatter so the cleanup pass closes truthfully.
acceptance_criteria: Remaining user-facing typography badge copy in the native foundation workspace uses typed localization accessors instead of inline string interpolation.
The formatting stays consistent across card and preview inspector surfaces.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: The remaining user-facing typography badge formatting in the native foundation workspace now uses a shared typed formatter instead of inline string interpolation.
Card and preview surfaces now share one localized scale-and-weight formatter, so the last foundation cleanup point cannot drift across native views.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the remaining foundation localization cleanup.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after replacing the remaining inline typography badge formatting.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0034: finish the last native hardcoded text cleanup in review/foundation/detail inspector surfaces.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the slice intentionally small and truthful if inventory really shows only a couple of remaining user-facing literals.
